SEARCH

Class MapManager

java.lang.Object
MapManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MapManager extends Object implements Serializable
Central facade coordinating all domain objects of the Emergency Dispatcher.

Stores hospitals and patients and ensures that the Delaunay triangulation, the Voronoi diagram and the patient-to-hospital assignments are always kept up to date after every modification.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Maissa Tirsane, Anas Chokri, Iyed Souissi, Valery Vo-Van
See Also:
  • MapPersistenceService
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MapManager()
    Creates an empty manager with all collections and services initialised.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addHospital(Hospital hospital)
    Adds a hospital and triggers a full geometry and assignment recomputation.
    void
    addPatient(Patient patient)
    Adds a patient and triggers a full geometry and assignment recomputation.
    void
    clearPatients()
    Removes all patients from the map and triggers a full recomputation.
    Hospital
    findHospitalByPosition(Coordinate position)
    Finds a hospital by geographic position.
    Hospital
    getAssignedHospital(Patient patient)
    Returns the hospital currently assigned to the given patient.
    Map<String,Hospital>
    getHospitals()
    Returns the hospital map indexed by identifier.
    Map<String,Patient>
    getPatients()
    Returns the patient map indexed by identifier.
    List<DelaunayTriangle>
    getTriangles()
    Returns the most recently computed list of Delaunay triangles.
    List<VoronoiEdge>
    getVoronoiEdges()
    Returns the most recently computed list of Voronoi edges.
    List<VoronoiZone>
    getZones()
    Returns the most recently computed list of Voronoi zones.
    boolean
    hasHospital(String hospitalId)
    Returns true if a hospital with the given identifier is registered.
    boolean
    hasPatient(String patientId)
    Returns true if a patient with the given identifier is registered.
    void
    initializeAfterLoading()
    Reinitialises transient fields after deserialisation and rebuilds the geometry.
    void
    moveHospital(String hospitalId, Coordinate newPosition)
    Moves a hospital to a new position and triggers a full recomputation.
    void
    movePatient(String patientId, Coordinate newPosition)
    Moves a patient to a new position and triggers a full recomputation.
    void
    recompute()
    Rebuilds all derived geometric structures and patient assignments from the current hospital and patient sets.
    void
    recomputeAssignments()
    Resets all hospital occupancy counters to zero and reassigns every patient to the best available hospital.
    void
    removeHospital(String hospitalId)
    Removes a hospital by identifier and triggers a full recomputation.
    void
    removePatient(String patientId)
    Removes a patient by identifier and triggers a full recomputation.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • MapManager

      public MapManager()
      Creates an empty manager with all collections and services initialised.

  • Method Details

    • addHospital

      public void addHospital(Hospital hospital)
      Adds a hospital and triggers a full geometry and assignment recomputation.
      Parameters:
      hospital - hospital to add; its id must be unique in this manager

    • addPatient

      public void addPatient(Patient patient)
      Adds a patient and triggers a full geometry and assignment recomputation.
      Parameters:
      patient - patient to add; its id must be unique in this manager

    • getHospitals

      public Map<String,Hospital> getHospitals()
      Returns the hospital map indexed by identifier.
      Returns:
      live map of hospitals

    • getPatients

      public Map<String,Patient> getPatients()
      Returns the patient map indexed by identifier.
      Returns:
      live map of patients

    • removeHospital

      public void removeHospital(String hospitalId)
      Removes a hospital by identifier and triggers a full recomputation.
      Parameters:
      hospitalId - identifier of the hospital to remove

    • moveHospital

      public void moveHospital(String hospitalId, Coordinate newPosition)
      Moves a hospital to a new position and triggers a full recomputation.
      Parameters:
      hospitalId - identifier of the hospital to move
      newPosition - new geographic position
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no hospital with hospitalId exists

    • removePatient

      public void removePatient(String patientId)
      Removes a patient by identifier and triggers a full recomputation.
      Parameters:
      patientId - identifier of the patient to remove

    • movePatient

      public void movePatient(String patientId, Coordinate newPosition)
      Moves a patient to a new position and triggers a full recomputation.
      Parameters:
      patientId - identifier of the patient to move
      newPosition - new geographic position
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no patient with patientId exists

    • recompute

      public void recompute()
      Rebuilds all derived geometric structures and patient assignments from the current hospital and patient sets.

      Called automatically after every state change to guarantee consistency.

    • getTriangles

      public List<DelaunayTriangle> getTriangles()
      Returns the most recently computed list of Delaunay triangles.
      Returns:
      list of triangles; empty if fewer than three hospitals are present

    • getZones

      public List<VoronoiZone> getZones()
      Returns the most recently computed list of Voronoi zones.
      Returns:
      list of zones

    • initializeAfterLoading

      public void initializeAfterLoading()
      Reinitialises transient fields after deserialisation and rebuilds the geometry.

      Must be called immediately after loading a MapManager from a file because Java serialisation skips transient fields.

    • recomputeAssignments

      public void recomputeAssignments()
      Resets all hospital occupancy counters to zero and reassigns every patient to the best available hospital.

    • getAssignedHospital

      public Hospital getAssignedHospital(Patient patient)
      Returns the hospital currently assigned to the given patient.
      Parameters:
      patient - patient whose assignment is requested
      Returns:
      the best matching hospital, or null if none is available

    • getVoronoiEdges

      public List<VoronoiEdge> getVoronoiEdges()
      Returns the most recently computed list of Voronoi edges.
      Returns:
      list of Voronoi edges

    • hasHospital

      public boolean hasHospital(String hospitalId)
      Returns true if a hospital with the given identifier is registered.
      Parameters:
      hospitalId - identifier to look up
      Returns:
      true if the hospital exists

    • hasPatient

      public boolean hasPatient(String patientId)
      Returns true if a patient with the given identifier is registered.
      Parameters:
      patientId - identifier to look up
      Returns:
      true if the patient exists

    • findHospitalByPosition

      public Hospital findHospitalByPosition(Coordinate position)
      Finds a hospital by geographic position.

      Used to map a canvas click or a triangle vertex back to a hospital object.

      Parameters:
      position - position to search for
      Returns:
      the hospital at that position, or null if none matches

    • clearPatients

      public void clearPatients()
      Removes all patients from the map and triggers a full recomputation.
